about.headline: About me
about.description: Hi, I'm a german speaking Fullstack Developer based in Austria. Motivated by the limitless opportunities within IT, I am excited about vrafting visually captivating and intuitive websites an applications.

content.paragraph1: Flexible in terms of working enviroments, I can work effectively both on-site in Austria and remotely
content.paragraph2: I am open-minded and always looking for personal challenges to constantly improve my knowledge and skills
content.paragraph3: In my profession, programming isn't just about writing code: it's a creative form of problem-solving, I take pride in my ability to distill complex technical challenges into simple, user-friendly solutions. This way, i help you achieve your goals and brong your vision to life

skills.headline: Skills
skills.description: My journey has involved working on diverse projects, employing a range of frontend and backend technologies and concepts. I am open to embracing new technologies and methodologies to Continously enhance my skills and stay ahead in the ever-evolving landscape of web development.
skills.paragraph: Fell free to contact me. I look forward to expanding on my previous knowledge

overlay.headline: I have a special interest in learning

projects.headline: Portfolio
projects.paragraph: Explore a selection of my work here - Interact with projects to see my skills in action.

join.name: Join
join.description: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.

poloLoco.name: El Polo Loco
poloLoco.description: El Polo Loco is a jump and run game

bubble.name: DABubble
bubble.description: DABubble is a chat messenger in the style of Slack.

coderr.name: Coderr
coderr.description: Coderr is a freelance platform for developers. The frontend was built with Vanilla JavaScript by the team from Developer Akademie, and the backend is powered by Django.

videoflix.name: Videoflix
videoflix.description: Videoflix is a video streaming platform similar to Netflix. It allows users to watch movies and series, with features like user registration, login.

testimonials.headline: What my colleagues say about me

t1.name: Simon Kiesner
t1.text: I had the pleasure of working with Marcel on our Join group project. He proved to be a reliable team player who conscientiously carried out the tasks he took on. His patient and calm demeanor made working with him in the team very pleasant, and whenever challenges arose, he was always willing to help out and put in extra hours if the project required it. All in all, Marcel's contribution was of great value to the success of our project, which is why I can highly recommend him.

t2.name: H.Janisch
t2.text: Marcel has proven to be a reliable group partner. His technical skills and proactive approach were crucial to the success of our project.

t3.name: Christoph Völker
t3.text: Marcel and I worked together on the project DA Bubble, a chat application using Angular for the frontend and Firebase for the backend. Ironically, the only challenge in our communication was occasionally his Austrian dialect—but that’s what the app was for, after all. Despite the short but intense project phase, Marcel was a true calming presence in the team. He always carried out his tasks reliably and with great conscientiousness, and he was there when things got tricky. Thank you, Marcel, for the great collaboration!

contact.headline: Let's work together
contact.paragraph: Contact me through this form, I am interested in hearing from you, knowing your ideas and contributing to your projects with my work.
